vocab.example: I believe that studying different art movements would definitely help me broaden my horizons and appreciate diverse cultures.

vocab.meaning: một người đang khao khát trở thành chuyên gia am hiểu
vocab.example: As an aspiring connoisseur, I hope to delve deeper into the technicalities of oil painting and art restoration in the coming years.
In the near future, I’d like to attend a pottery workshop to finally unleash my creativity and work with my hands.
Developing a better aesthetic appreciation would allow me to find deeper meaning when visiting world-class galleries.
I find the philosophy behind abstract art incredibly intellectually stimulating, and I’m keen to research it further.

vocab.meaning: đắm mình vào cái gì đó
vocab.example: I would love to travel to Florence and immerse myself in the rich artistic heritage of the Renaissance era.
Learning about art history provides a profound insight into the social and political climates of different centuries.
I’m planning to enroll in a digital art course to master the techniques of shading and perspective.

vocab.meaning: một hình thức tự thể hiện bản thân
vocab.example: I've always viewed art as a vital form of self-expression, so I want to explore how I can use it to convey my complex emotions.
I’m quite interested in learning how modern creators are building upon the artistic legacy of past masters.
